context: Tests whether the agent creates a next-steps.sh script with correct quality checks for a docs-only tile: tessl scenario generate and tessl eval run, but NO tessl skill review (no skills in this tile).

checklist.name: next-steps.sh includes scenario generate
checklist.description: next-steps.sh contains a tessl scenario generate command for the tile.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh includes eval run
checklist.description: next-steps.sh contains a tessl eval run command for the tile.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh does not include skill review
checklist.description: next-steps.sh does NOT contain tessl skill review since this tile has no skills.

checklist.name: Valid docs tile
checklist.description: The tile has tile.json with docs field, docs/index.md, and docs/services.md with appropriate content.

checklist.name: Explicit private field
checklist.description: The tile.json contains an explicit "private" field (either true or false).
